titleStmt.title: SII 31.139: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 139. (A.R. No. B 255 of 1938.) PANDIḶḶAPALLE KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab setup in front of the Veṇkṭeśvarasvāmi temple.
It is dated in Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Phālguṇa, śu. 15, (corresponding to March 8, Friday (expired) 1554 A.D.

It registers the gift of lands to the temple of Prasanna Venkaṭeśvarāya and to other Gods by Gōbūri Timmayadēvamahārāja for the merit of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Nandyāla Tiṁmayarājayadēvamahārāja and also to several individuals (names mentioned) for the service rendered to the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svastiśrī . jayābhyudha
ya śālivāhana śakhā(ka)va¨rṣaṁbu
lu 1476 Agunēṭi Ānaṁda saṁ
vatsara phālluṇa śu 15 lu śrīman
mahāmaṁḍalēsva(śva)ra naṁdyāla tiṁmaya
rājayadēvamahārājuku puṇyaṁgā
nu paṁdiḷlapalle prasaṁna veṁkaṭarāyani
ki gobūri tiṁmayadēvamahārāju
lugāru daṁḍaṁ sama¨rpiṁci(yici)I
cinadha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . Āragiṁpulakupeṭinacēsu
kha . 0 Aka(kha)ṁḍa tiruvaḷikekupeṭina cēnuṭi
cātupaḍiki cēnu Ê 5 nnu Aruveṁkaṭādriki
cēnu kha . 0 nu saṁbhaṭūrivisvakṣēnuniki cēnu
Ê 4 nnu bhōjanapalli śrīnivāsayagāriki cē
nukha . 3 nnu veṁkaṭarāyani kōvilegaṁṭi
sa kāśasidōju budōjugāriki peṭina cē
nu Ê 4 nu dāsarisāniki peṭina cēnu Ê 1 nnu
dōḷanāgasarālavāriki mūḍupēḷalānu pū
ḷigeṁ śē(cē)sēṭaṁdulaku peṭina cēnu Ê 4 nnupeṭi
vēyiṁcina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ . yīdha¨rmmānaku
yavaruganaka tappinānu gōbrāhmaṇavadha śē(cē)śina
pāpāna bōvuvāru . śrī śrī śrī
guḍiki dūlālu daṁtelucekkina bayanaku cē
nu Ê 1 yistimi .
Digital edition of SII 31.139 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
